title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 79.310 - Collector to make annual report
text:
79.310.  Collector to make annual report. — The collector shall, annually, at such times as may be designated by ordinance, make a detailed report to the board of aldermen, stating the various moneys collected by him during the year, and the amounts uncollected and the names of the persons from which he failed to collect and the causes therefor.
(RSMo 1939 § 7193) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7043; 1919 § 8494; 1909 § 9396 
Collector to settle monthly with treasurer, 95.360
